summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LOGITAG login page redesign. All 10 required modern design features work perfectly. Split-panel layout, branding, form functionality, and interactions all successful.

external_api_notes.issue: Returns 500 errors and WebSocket connection failures
external_api_notes.impact: None - frontend works independently, these are external backend issues

passed_tests: Login page loads with modern split layout (dark left panel, white right panel)
LogiTAG brand title displays with blue accent on 'TAG'
Feature list shows 4 items: GPS tracking, fleet management, analytics, billing
Login form has 'Identifiant' field with user icon and 'Mot de passe' field with lock icon
Password toggle button (eye icon) works correctly to show/hide password
Form validation: submit button disabled with empty fields, enabled with filled fields
'Mot de passe oublié ?' link is clickable and opens dialog properly
'Se connecter' button displays with arrow icon
Footer shows '© 2026 LogiTAG — Tous droits réservés'
All design elements visible and interactive (7/7 layout elements confirmed)
Password field icons, toggle functionality, and form inputs work correctly
success_percentage: 100% - All frontend design and functionality requirements met perfectly
